channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Blur n Bokeh
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥6.00
平台：macOS
Blur n Bokeh is a tool to give highlight and focus to your images by blurring or editing the background of your image. With Blur n Bokeh you can easily apply our great filter effects to the selected area or the background. Some of the features of Blur n Bokeh - - User have full control to select

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Disk Graph
item.description:
原价：¥25.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
Disk Graph is a tool that allows you to inspect your disk and easily find the files that take away most of your disk space. With its beautiful interface and the pie graph, locating big files has never been easier. * You can try out the free Disk Graph Lite in order to find out if this is the right

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Faviconer
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥6.00
平台：macOS
Faviconer creates a favicon for a website (the site icon you see in browser's favorites and next to the page title). It is simple and intuitive. Select source images, click a button, and the favicon is ready! Creating favicons never was so easy. Faviconer supports most of commonly used image format

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」App Secret
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
App Secret offers you a new way to protect your data and keep all the important information untouched. Use an array of lock options to securely protect the important data on your device and prevent unauthorized access. How many times has this happened to you? You lend someone your phone, and they

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Hot Simple Image Viewer
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥6.00
平台：macOS
Hot Simple Image Viewer is keyboard and mouse controlled viewer intended to make viewing of files inside one folder easy. Inspired by good ol' Irfan view it uses simply shortcuts: - space to move to next file in directory; - enter to toggles full screen view; - arrow keys to navigate back and for

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Calcvier - Keyboard Calculator
item.description:
原价：¥18.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
The Calcvier will turn your keyboard into Calculator! Add calculator keyboard to make fast calculations anywhere. No need to switch between apps or use some widget, no need to copy and paste results! To enable Calcvier on your device: 1) Open Settings app 2) Go to General > Keyboard > Keyboards 3)

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」超级橡皮擦Eraser Pro: 修图,智能缩放图像
item.description:
原价：¥50.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：macOS
＊ 限时促销。原价198元。只为手快的您准备。 Super Eraser Pro是一款异常强大的图片处理软件，有着很实用的四个功能：擦除, 智能缩放, 去噪, 去雾. Super Eraser Pro易于擦除图像中不需要的对象如删除水印，日期戳，额外的文字，建筑等等并保持原有的重要视觉效果不发生改变。它采用最新的革命性的图像处理技术，具有最好的擦除效果. 优势功能在于智能「缩放」图片，可以缩小或放大图像, 便改进构图. 它能非均匀的调整图像尺寸, 而不会破坏或裁切掉主体物,突出图像特点而不会使图像失真. 软件特色： - 智能缩放功能： 智能调整照片尺寸，它可以智能改变照片中物体之间的距

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」CALC Smart
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
CALC has a smarter way about your daily math + is always on the latest iOS & empowered by user ideas. Fav. fan quote? "Functionality & Beauty can co-exist" * FEATURED by Apple in Utilities & in Calculate & Convert * VERIFIED by 7.7k global Reviews & over 100M sessions * LOVED for its Efficient UI w

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」SkySafari
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
SkySafari is a powerful planetarium that fits in your pocket, puts the universe at your fingertips, and is incredibly easy to use! Simply hold your device to the sky and quickly locate planets, constellations, satellites, and millions of stars and deep sky objects. Use Augmented Reality (AR) mode

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Snippit
item.description:
原价：¥8.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
Snippit is a code management app for the cloud. Without iCloud, you can still use Snippit - it just won't be quite so cool. With Snippit, you can.. • Create & Edit Snippets in Objective-C, Swift, Python, and dozens more! • Edit your code • Share Image of your snippet with line numbers, pre-form

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」after FOCUS 复古自拍相机 - 胶片滤镜，照片编辑
item.description:
原价：¥6.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
人的一生，一半是回忆，一半是继续。 透过 after FOCUS 提供的1000多种随机日期水印和专业摄影师钟爱的高质感胶片滤镜。 您可以自定义日期水印，让照片中的时光回到您想要的时刻。 无论您是寻找复古滤镜还是胶片光效滤镜，您都可以在 after FOCUS 找到。 只需不断单击每个滤镜图标，即可自动随机匹配滤镜，直到找到您想要的效果。 after FOCUS 易于使用，请尽情享受！ 感谢您的使用！我们一直在努力改善您的照片编辑体验。 联系我们：http://cudak.weebly.com

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」Windy White Noise Sleep Sounds
item.description:
原价：¥12.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
Can't sleep? Let Windy help you fall asleep fast and mask annoying noises that keep you awake at night. Windy is a nature-based white noise app featuring a great variety of actual wind ambience recordings from nature in very high quality. Windy is brought to you by Emmy-award winner Gordon Hempton a

item.title: 「免费」-「iOS」English Grammar Practice 2018
item.description:
原价：¥6.00 -> 现价：¥0.00
平台：iOS
If you want to improve your English grammar greatly, this application is for you. Doing these tests with explanations, you can improve your grammar from Basic to Advanced - free. You will not see only tests. You will also see explanations for each test. It will help you to understand your weak poin

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」滤镜派对 Pro - 摄影玩家爱用的创意滤镜与数码暗房
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥12.00
平台：macOS
获英国、美国、瑞士 Mac App Store 商用类软体畅销榜，滤镜派对 Filter Lens Party® 是一款文青最爱用的专业摄影滤镜软体，它拥有丰富华丽的各式美拍滤镜库，让每一个修图新手都能轻易的驾驭它，帮助你玩转色彩、快速的在照片中呈现出无可挑剔的动人影像。 ◉ WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT 滤镜派对 Filter Lens Party® 提供超过400款专业摄影滤镜，提供各式DSLR数位摄影相机常见的外挂滤镜效果，让您心爱的摄影作品产生戏剧性的复古、黑白、渐变、漏光、艺术等影像风格，让您摇身一变成为滤镜大师！ ◉ MORE AWESOME FEATURES • 超过

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」屏幕画笔
item.description:
原价：¥18.00 -> 现价：¥6.00
平台：macOS
屏幕画笔是个很有用程序，它可以让我们直接在屏幕上画圈圈、线头、标箭头或打字，方便把整个电脑屏幕当做是个电子白板(或黑板)，直接用各种线条、圈圈或箭头、勾勾...等符号，在屏幕的窗口、图案、各种图表中乱涂鸦或做各种标示，拿来当做上课、演讲或做简报时使用，相当方便!! 画完之后，还可以直接把刚刚标示的内容与笔迹，保存为一个图像，等到演讲或上课完后再把图像寄给学员，让大家可以更清楚牢记每一张图表或课程的讲解内容。 功能介绍： 1. 提供线条，箭头，圆形，矩形等形状，也可任意绘制线条 2. 屏幕任意位置打字 3. 支持橡皮擦 4. 提供各种预设颜色供选择 5. 支持设置时间，到时间笔迹自动消失 6

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」敲木鱼 - 打节拍敲音效解压神器
item.description:
原价：¥3.00 -> 现价：¥1.00
平台：iOS
Heo开发的「敲木鱼」应用来了！ 这是一款音效敲击应用，你可以通过点击屏幕/摇动/设置自动敲击的形式播放你需要的音效！你的随身音效台。 —— 木鱼：感受灵魂的静寂，让时光拉回到缓慢的节奏，放松自己的身心 水滴：水滴石穿的过程，正像你百折不挠的信念 寺钟：感受磅礴的力量，为自己充满能量 铃铛：感受来自灵魂震荡的通透 亲吻：小姐姐的关爱，让你加倍获得前行的动力 猫咪：快乐和温暖，由猫咪带给你！ 狗狗：舒心和安全感，由狗狗带给你！ 乌鸦：整蛊好友音效，合适时间放松一下！ 鸡哥：只因你太美 击掌：欢快的节拍，与你共同奏响 心跳：紧张的情绪通过敲击展现 乒乓：感受运动的激情 快板：配合摇动检测真有打快

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Phase84
item.description:
原价：¥68.00 -> 现价：¥30.00
平台：iOS
Phase84 is a next generation phase distortion synthesizer. It fuses gritty digital sounds with traditional analog punch. +++++ Phase84 is a Tabletop Ready App. Combine Phase84 with drum machines, sequencers, effects, and more inside Tabletop — a free modular music app for iPad. +++++ Phase84 is a

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iMPC for iPhone
item.description:
原价：¥30.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Turn your iPhone into an MPC with more than 600 samples, 47 editable programs, 80 editable sequences, and iconic MPC workflow. Need help? Have an issue or question? Please email us at support@retronyms.com. iMPC brings the look and feel of the classic Akai Pro MPC to your iPhone. iMPC includes eve

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iMPC
item.description:
原价：¥45.00 -> 现价：¥18.00
平台：iOS
Turn your iPad into an MPC with more than 1,200 samples, 50 editable programs, 80 editable sequences, and iconic MPC workflow. Need help? Have an issue or question? Please email us at support@retronyms.com. iMPC brings the look and feel of the classic Akai Pro MPC to your iPad. iMPC includes ever

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」iMPC Pro 2
item.description:
原价：¥163.00 -> 现价：¥88.00
平台：iOS
iMPC Pro 2 fuses innovative song creation with the iconic MPC workflow. iMPC Pro gave us a powerful sampler and beatmaker, and now iMPC Pro 2 has evolved into a full fledged song creation tool with the addition of vocal tracks, Audio Units integration, a sleek new design and tons of new features! A
